fa-file-waveform.appearanceId: document outline with a folded corner at the top right and a waveform or ECG pulse line drawn across the lower portion; page shape with a jagged or sinusoidal wave graphic inside
fa-file-waveform.functionalityId: opens a medical waveform record or diagnostic signal file; accesses an ECG, vitals log, or audio waveform document
fa-file-waveform.intentId: review a waveform-based medical or signal recording; open a file containing physiological or audio wave data

fa-file-word.appearanceId: document outline with a folded corner at the top right and the letter W label or WORD text overlay centered on the page body; page shape with a Microsoft Word format badge
fa-file-word.functionalityId: opens or creates a Word-formatted document file; associates a file with the Microsoft Word application
fa-file-word.intentId: work with a Microsoft Word document; open or save a file in the .docx word processing format

fa-file-xls.appearanceId: document outline with a folded corner at the top right and an XLS text label centered on the page body; page shape with a spreadsheet format badge showing the XLS abbreviation
fa-file-xls.functionalityId: opens or creates an XLS spreadsheet file; associates a file with a legacy Excel spreadsheet format
fa-file-xls.intentId: work with an XLS spreadsheet document; open or export data in the older Excel file format

fa-file-xml.appearanceId: document outline with a folded corner at the top right and an XML text label centered on the page body; page shape with an XML markup format badge
fa-file-xml.functionalityId: opens or processes an XML-formatted data file; associates a file with extensible markup language content
fa-file-xml.intentId: work with an XML data or configuration file; open or parse a document in XML format

fa-file-zip.appearanceId: document outline with a folded corner at the top right and a ZIP text label centered on the page body; page shape with a compressed archive format badge
fa-file-zip.functionalityId: opens or creates a ZIP compressed archive file; associates a file with a zipped or compressed bundle
fa-file-zip.intentId: compress files into or extract files from a ZIP archive; manage a compressed file package

fa-file-zipper.appearanceId: document outline with a folded corner at the top right and a zipper or compression symbol running vertically along the page; page shape with an interlocking zipper track overlay indicating compression
fa-file-zipper.functionalityId: compresses or archives a file into a zipped bundle; opens a zip or archive management tool for the selected file
fa-file-zipper.intentId: compress a file or folder into an archive; manage zipping or unzipping of a file bundle

fa-files.appearanceId: two overlapping document outlines with folded corners, one offset behind the other in a stacked arrangement; a pair of page shapes layered together suggesting multiple files
fa-files.functionalityId: accesses or manages multiple files in a grouped view; navigates to a multi-file selection or bulk file operation panel
fa-files.intentId: manage or view a collection of multiple files; perform bulk operations on a set of documents

fa-files-medical.appearanceId: two overlapping document outlines with folded corners and a medical cross or plus symbol on the front page; stacked page shapes with a health or medical indicator badge on the top document
fa-files-medical.functionalityId: opens or manages a set of medical record files; navigates to a patient document collection or clinical file repository
fa-files-medical.intentId: access a collection of medical records or health documents; manage patient files in a clinical or healthcare context

fa-fill.appearanceId: a paint bucket silhouette tilted at an angle with a drip or drop at the spout tip; bucket container shape angled with a small liquid drip emerging from its opening
fa-fill.functionalityId: fills a closed region or shape with the selected color; applies a solid color fill to a selected area on a canvas
fa-fill.intentId: color a region or enclosed shape with a solid fill; apply background color to a selected area in a design tool

fa-fill-drip.appearanceId: a paint bucket silhouette tilted at an angle with a larger drip or teardrop drop falling from the spout; angled bucket shape with a prominent falling liquid drop below its tip
fa-fill-drip.functionalityId: applies a color fill with an active drip effect to a canvas area; triggers a paint-bucket fill action on a selected region
fa-fill-drip.intentId: fill a region with color using the paint bucket tool; change the background or fill color of a selected shape or area

fa-film.appearanceId: a horizontal filmstrip rectangle with small square perforations along the top and bottom edges and two rectangular frame cells in the center; classic celluloid strip shape with sprocket holes along both borders
fa-film.functionalityId: opens a video player or media file; navigates to a video library or film content section
fa-film.intentId: play or browse video content; access a film library or media archive

fa-film-alt.appearanceId: a filmstrip rectangle with perforations along both edges and a slightly altered internal frame layout or aspect ratio compared to the standard strip; variant celluloid strip shape with sprocket holes and modified inner frames
fa-film-alt.functionalityId: opens an alternate video format or media item; accesses a film or video entry in an alternate display context
fa-film-alt.intentId: view or play video content in an alternate format; access film media in a variant presentation style

fa-film-canister.appearanceId: a cylindrical canister shape viewed from the side or at a slight angle with a lid or cap on top and a circular reel profile; round lidded container silhouette suggesting a film roll storage tin
fa-film-canister.functionalityId: accesses stored or archived film reels or media canisters; navigates to a physical or archived media storage section
fa-film-canister.intentId: manage or retrieve archived film or physical media; locate a stored film reel in an inventory or collection

fa-film-slash.appearanceId: a horizontal filmstrip rectangle with perforations along the top and bottom edges and a diagonal slash line crossing through the entire strip; standard celluloid strip with a strike-through indicating disabled or no video
fa-film-slash.functionalityId: disables or removes video from a media item; indicates that no film or video content is available or allowed
fa-film-slash.intentId: block or disable video playback for a selected item; indicate that film or video content is unavailable or restricted

fa-films.appearanceId: two overlapping filmstrip rectangles with sprocket holes along the edges, offset slightly to show depth or multiplicity; a stacked or fanned pair of celluloid strips suggesting multiple films
fa-films.functionalityId: opens a multi-film library or video collection view; navigates to a grouped set of video or film entries
fa-films.intentId: browse or manage a collection of multiple films or videos; access a bulk video library or multi-film playlist

fa-filter.appearanceId: a downward-pointing funnel or triangle with a wider opening at the top narrowing to a single outlet at the bottom; classic inverted triangle filter shape with converging sides leading to a small spout
fa-filter.functionalityId: applies filter criteria to narrow down a list or dataset; opens a filter panel to refine visible results
fa-filter.intentId: narrow a list or dataset by applying search filters; refine visible results based on specified criteria

fa-filter-circle-xmark.appearanceId: a downward-pointing funnel shape with a small circle containing an X mark overlaid at the upper right corner; inverted triangle filter with a circular remove or cancel badge
fa-filter-circle-xmark.functionalityId: clears all applied filters from the current view; removes an active filter from a dataset or list
fa-filter-circle-xmark.intentId: remove all active filters to restore the full unfiltered view; cancel a currently applied filter setting

fa-filter-list.appearanceId: a downward-pointing funnel shape combined with several short horizontal lines to the right suggesting a list; inverted triangle filter with stacked line items adjacent to it
fa-filter-list.functionalityId: opens a list of available filter options for a dataset; displays active filters as a manageable list
fa-filter-list.intentId: review and manage a list of applied or available filters; select from a menu of filter criteria options

fa-filter-slash.appearanceId: a downward-pointing funnel shape with a diagonal slash line crossing through it; inverted triangle filter silhouette bisected by a strike-through line indicating disabled filtering
fa-filter-slash.functionalityId: disables or bypasses the active filter on a dataset; clears filtering and restores the unfiltered result set
fa-filter-slash.intentId: turn off or disable a filter to show all results; remove filtering from a dataset to view the complete list

fa-filters.appearanceId: two side-by-side or slightly overlapping funnel shapes suggesting multiple filter options; a pair of inverted triangle filter silhouettes representing a compound or multi-filter control
fa-filters.functionalityId: opens a multi-filter configuration panel for a dataset; applies or manages multiple simultaneous filter criteria
fa-filters.intentId: configure multiple filters at once for a complex query; manage compound filtering across several data dimensions

fa-fingerprint.appearanceId: a set of closely spaced concentric arc lines forming an oval fingerprint whorl pattern with a central point; curved parallel ridgelines arranged in an elliptical loop suggesting a human fingertip print
fa-fingerprint.functionalityId: authenticates a user via biometric fingerprint scanning; enables or triggers fingerprint login for secure access
fa-fingerprint.intentId: log in or verify identity using a fingerprint scanner; enable biometric authentication for secure access

fa-fire.appearanceId: a tapered flame shape with a wider rounded base that narrows to a pointed tip, with inner flame curves suggesting layered burning; upward-reaching fire silhouette with flowing curved sides and a pointed apex
fa-fire.functionalityId: marks content as trending, hot, or high-priority; indicates an active fire hazard or burning event
fa-fire.intentId: highlight trending or popular content; flag an active fire or high-heat condition in a safety or status context

fa-fire-alt.appearanceId: a rounded bulbous flame shape with a wider body and smoother curves compared to the standard flame, suggesting a softer or fuller burn; plump flame silhouette with rounded sides and a slightly flatter tip
fa-fire-alt.functionalityId: marks content as hot or trending using an alternate flame style; indicates fire or heat with a rounder visual variant
fa-fire-alt.intentId: highlight popular or active content with an alternate fire visual; indicate heat or flame in a context requiring a softer icon style

fa-fire-burner.appearanceId: a gas burner or stovetop grate shape viewed from above with radiating flame jets and a circular ring structure; flat circular grate with multiple upward-pointing flame prongs around the ring
fa-fire-burner.functionalityId: indicates a gas burner or cooking flame element in use; navigates to stovetop or burner control settings
fa-fire-burner.intentId: control or monitor a gas burner or stove element; manage cooking appliance settings related to open flame

fa-fire-extinguisher.appearanceId: a tall cylindrical canister with a conical top, a trigger handle and hose nozzle extending from the upper portion; upright pressurized cylinder silhouette with a handle and discharge hose typical of a safety extinguisher
fa-fire-extinguisher.functionalityId: marks a fire extinguisher location on a safety map; indicates fire suppression resources or emergency equipment nearby
fa-fire-extinguisher.intentId: locate a fire extinguisher in a building map or safety plan; access emergency fire suppression information

fa-fire-hydrant.appearanceId: a squat barrel-shaped fire hydrant with a domed cap on top, two side outlet caps, and a wide base flange; short cylindrical street hydrant silhouette with bolt caps and side nozzle covers
fa-fire-hydrant.functionalityId: marks a fire hydrant location on a map or infrastructure view; indicates a water supply point for emergency fire response
fa-fire-hydrant.intentId: locate a fire hydrant on a street or facility map; plan emergency water access for fire response

fa-fire-smoke.appearanceId: a flame shape at the base with wavy smoke or cloud puffs rising above it; an upward-pointing fire tongue combined with billowing curved smoke lines above the flame
fa-fire-smoke.functionalityId: indicates an active fire with visible smoke or hazardous air quality; marks a burning event producing smoke in a safety or monitoring context
fa-fire-smoke.intentId: report or respond to a fire producing hazardous smoke; monitor air quality alerts related to active burning

fa-fireplace.appearanceId: a rectangular hearth opening framed by a mantel arch or surround, with flames visible inside the lower portion; arched or rectangular fireplace facade silhouette with a burning flame inside the firebox
fa-fireplace.functionalityId: activates a fireplace ambiance mode or home heating display; navigates to home comfort or heating system settings
fa-fireplace.intentId: control or enjoy a fireplace feature in a smart home or ambiance app; access heating or cozy atmosphere settings

fa-firewall.appearanceId: a brick wall pattern with a flame overlaid in front of or behind it; rectangular stacked-brick texture combined with a fire silhouette suggesting a protective barrier against flames
fa-firewall.functionalityId: configures or enables a network firewall for security protection; navigates to firewall rules or network barrier settings
fa-firewall.intentId: protect a network or system by configuring firewall rules; manage security barriers to block unauthorized traffic

fa-first-aid.appearanceId: a rectangular or square box with a medical plus cross symbol centered on the lid face; flat-topped case outline with a bold cross badge on the front panel
fa-first-aid.functionalityId: opens a first aid information panel or emergency instructions; locates first aid supplies or a medical kit on a map
fa-first-aid.intentId: access first aid resources or emergency medical instructions; find a first aid kit or medical supply location

fa-fish.appearanceId: a side-profile fish silhouette with a rounded body, a forked or fan-shaped tail fin, and a small eye dot; streamlined aquatic creature outline with a defined tail and a small circular eye
fa-fish.functionalityId: navigates to a seafood menu category or aquatic species listing; marks content related to fish or marine life
fa-fish.intentId: browse seafood options or aquatic species content; identify or categorize fish-related items in a menu or inventory

fa-fish-bones.appearanceId: a bare fish skeleton silhouette with a spine running horizontally, riblike bones branching off symmetrically, a fish head outline at one end, and a tail at the other; stripped fishbone structure with lateral rib lines
fa-fish-bones.functionalityId: marks a food item as consumed or completely eaten; indicates an empty or depleted seafood resource in an inventory
fa-fish-bones.intentId: indicate that food has been fully consumed or a resource is depleted; use as a humorous or thematic empty-state marker

fa-fish-cooked.appearanceId: a side-profile fish shape on what appears to be a plate or with visual cues suggesting it has been prepared or cooked, such as garnish lines or serving position; plated fish silhouette with a served or prepared presentation
fa-fish-cooked.functionalityId: indicates a cooked fish dish on a menu or food order; marks a seafood preparation step as complete in a recipe workflow
fa-fish-cooked.intentId: order or view a cooked fish dish on a food menu; mark a fish preparation task as done in a cooking workflow

fa-fish-fins.appearanceId: a side-profile fish silhouette with prominently detailed dorsal, pectoral, and tail fins accentuated compared to the standard fish shape; fish body outline with exaggerated or clearly defined fin structures
fa-fish-fins.functionalityId: marks content related to fish species identification or aquatic biology; navigates to a fin-specific detail view of an aquatic creature
fa-fish-fins.intentId: identify or learn about fish fin anatomy or a specific finned species; access detailed aquatic species information

fa-fishing-rod.appearanceId: a long thin angled rod with a curved tip and a line extending downward from the tip to a hook or lure; tapered fishing pole silhouette with a dangling line and small hook at the end
fa-fishing-rod.functionalityId: navigates to fishing activity tracking or an angling log; marks content related to recreational fishing
fa-fishing-rod.intentId: track a fishing trip or log a catch; access fishing-related activities or recreational content

fa-flag.appearanceId: a rectangular flag panel attached to a vertical pole at the left edge, with the flag fabric flowing to the right; waving or flat rectangular banner on a flagpole
fa-flag.functionalityId: flags or marks an item for follow-up or review; reports content or marks a location with a flag indicator
fa-flag.intentId: mark an item for attention or follow-up; flag content or a location for review or reporting

fa-flag-alt.appearanceId: a pennant or triangular flag shape attached to a short pole, tapering to a point on the right side; triangular banner on a staff narrowing to a sharp tip instead of a rectangular edge
fa-flag-alt.functionalityId: flags or bookmarks an item using a triangular pennant marker; marks a sports or competition-related position or milestone
fa-flag-alt.intentId: mark a milestone, position, or item with a pennant flag; bookmark a point in a race, game, or workflow

fa-flag-checkered.appearanceId: a rectangular flag with a black-and-white checkerboard pattern on a pole; waving banner filled with alternating dark and light squares in a racing finish-line pattern
fa-flag-checkered.functionalityId: marks the completion or finish of a race, task, or process; indicates the end or winner of a competitive event
fa-flag-checkered.intentId: signal the completion or finish of a race or task; mark the end of a competitive event or workflow milestone

fa-flag-usa.appearanceId: a rectangular flag on a pole featuring horizontal stripes and a canton with a star field pattern in the upper left corner; American flag silhouette with stripes and a stars rectangle
fa-flag-usa.functionalityId: filters or marks content as related to the United States; selects or displays USA-specific language, region, or content
fa-flag-usa.intentId: filter content by the United States region; indicate or select US-specific settings, content, or availability

fa-flame.appearanceId: a single narrow upright flame tongue shape, taller and more slender than the standard fire icon, tapering sharply to a pointed tip; thin elongated single flame silhouette with a slim base and sharp apex
fa-flame.functionalityId: marks a single item as hot, active, or on fire; indicates a minimal or individual flame event in a status display
fa-flame.intentId: highlight a single active or hot item; indicate a small flame or minimal fire condition in a monitoring context

fa-flashlight.appearanceId: an elongated cylindrical flashlight body with a wider flared head at one end emitting a beam triangle; handheld torch silhouette with a conical light beam projecting from the wider front end
fa-flashlight.functionalityId: activates a device torch or flashlight function; navigates to a lighting or illumination feature in an app
fa-flashlight.intentId: turn on a flashlight or torch on a device; use a lighting tool in a low-light or utility context

fa-flask.appearanceId: an Erlenmeyer flask or conical laboratory bottle shape with a narrow neck widening to a broad flat-bottomed body; classic lab flask silhouette with a cylindrical neck and triangular lower body
fa-flask.functionalityId: indicates a laboratory test, experiment, or science-related process; opens a lab or experiment configuration in a science application
fa-flask.intentId: perform or track a scientific experiment; access lab or chemistry tools in a research or education context

fa-flask-gear.appearanceId: an Erlenmeyer flask shape with a gear or cog overlay badge at the lower right or overlapping the body; lab bottle silhouette combined with a toothed gear indicating configuration
fa-flask-gear.functionalityId: opens lab experiment settings or configures a scientific test workflow; adjusts parameters for a chemistry or science process
fa-flask-gear.intentId: configure or customize a laboratory experiment or scientific process; set up parameters for a research workflow

fa-flask-poison.appearanceId: an Erlenmeyer flask shape with a skull-and-crossbones or poison symbol overlaid on the body; lab bottle silhouette combined with a hazard or toxicity indicator badge
fa-flask-poison.functionalityId: marks a substance or item as toxic, hazardous, or poisonous; indicates dangerous or prohibited chemical content in a lab context
fa-flask-poison.intentId: warn users about a toxic or poisonous substance; label hazardous materials or dangerous chemical items

fa-flask-potion.appearanceId: a rounded potion bottle or flask shape with a cork or stopper at the top and a teardrop or bubble motif on the body; small bulbous bottle silhouette with a sealed top and a decorative drop detail
fa-flask-potion.functionalityId: marks a consumable potion or power-up item in a game inventory; indicates a magical or special-effect substance in a fantasy context
fa-flask-potion.intentId: use or manage a potion or consumable item in a game; access magical or special-effect items in a fantasy application

fa-flask-vial.appearanceId: an Erlenmeyer flask shape paired with or connected to a small cylindrical vial alongside it; lab flask silhouette combined with a narrow test-tube vial as a companion container
fa-flask-vial.functionalityId: manages paired lab containers or a flask-and-vial sample set; navigates to a dual-sample or combined chemistry workflow
fa-flask-vial.intentId: work with paired laboratory samples in a flask and vial setup; manage a multi-container chemistry or lab experiment

fa-flatbread.appearanceId: a flat oval or round disc shape suggesting an unfolded flatbread or pita without fillings; simple smooth oval bread silhouette with no toppings or cuts
fa-flatbread.functionalityId: selects or adds a flatbread item in a food ordering interface; marks a menu item as a flatbread-style dish
fa-flatbread.intentId: order or browse flatbread food items on a menu; select a plain flatbread option in a food ordering workflow

fa-flatbread-stuffed.appearanceId: a folded or slightly open oval flatbread shape with visible filling content inside the pocket; flatbread silhouette showing a split or open edge revealing stuffing or filling inside
fa-flatbread-stuffed.functionalityId: selects or adds a stuffed flatbread or filled wrap in a food ordering interface; marks a menu item as a stuffed or filled flatbread dish
fa-flatbread-stuffed.intentId: order or browse stuffed flatbread or wrap items on a menu; select a filled flatbread option in a food ordering workflow
